entries.title: OG image, RSS, writing hub
entries.body: Dedicated 1200×630 og-image.png (regenerate with scripts/generate_og_image.py). Mobile menu closes on outside click. Phase 3: RSS at feed.xml (regenerate with scripts/generate_feed.py), writing.html hub for guides, robots.txt + sitemap.xml. Log entries now have stable anchors (#log-entry-YYYY-MM-DD) for RSS links.

entries.title: Phase 2 polish
entries.body: Projects page: filter chips for SWE / Data / ML plus role tags on each card. Mobile nav uses a hamburger + full-width panel. Added favicon, Open Graph + Twitter cards, and a sample video embed below (Big Buck Bunny—replace with your own vlog id anytime).

entries.title: Build log is live
entries.body: Added a daily-style build log to the site: short notes on what I'm shipping, learning, or reading. Entries live in data/log.json—push a commit to publish.

entries.title: Portfolio positioning
entries.body: Refined the home narrative around software engineering, data science, and ML engineering. The goal is a single scan for recruiters: who I am, what I build, and that I iterate in public.
